uplink.description: 0x53 periodic data, five ΔP samples (newest-first); newest -> pressure.differential (Pa), older -> samples
uplink._note: TTN catalog example input for vendor/adeunis/deltap. Pressure values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (signed int16BE, Pa: 0xFE0C=-500, 0xFF06=-250, 0x0000=0, 0x00FA=250, 0x01F4=500, newest-first; status 0x20 -> frameCounter 1, all flags clear). The device reports calibrated ΔP directly in Pa, so the value maps straight to pressure.differential with no conversion. Upstream nests these under data.bytes.deltaPressure.values; we lift the newest reading to the top level and keep older readings in the camelCase extra samples.

uplink.description: 0x53 single sample with status flags set (frameCounter 1, lowBattery, configurationDone)
uplink._note: Synthetic single-sample frame; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Pressure 0x00FA=250 Pa. Status byte 0x23 -> frameCounter (0x23&0xe0)>>5=1, lowBattery (0x23&0x02), configurationDone (0x23&0x01), configurationInconsistency (0x23&0x08)=0. Single sample, so no samples extra.

uplink.description: 0x54 alarm frame, active, positive ΔP -> pressure.differential (Pa) + alarmStatus extra
uplink._note: Synthetic alarm frame; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (alarm flag byte 0x01 -> active; ΔP signed int16BE 0x00FA=250 Pa at offset 3; status 0x20 -> frameCounter 1, flags clear).

uplink.description: 0x55 periodic 0-10 V variant -> raw transducer voltage (mV) only, NO pressure.differential
uplink._note: Synthetic 0-10 V-variant frame; voltages confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (signed int16BE mV: 0x03E8=1000, 0x01F4=500, newest-first; status 0x20). The 0-10 V product reports a raw transducer voltage with no transfer function on the wire, so it cannot be converted to a calibrated ΔP and is preserved as the camelCase extra voltage (mV); this frame intentionally produces no pressure.differential.

uplink.description: Short payload (frame code only) returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic truncated frame; fewer than 2 bytes cannot carry the frame-code + status-byte header.

uplink.description: Unsupported frame code (0xff) returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic; 0xff is not an Adeunis Delta P frame code. Upstream silently returns {type:'Unknown'} under data.bytes; our normalized codec errors instead.
